sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_time DateTime, description String);
UPDATE test_dates SET event_time = parseDateTimeBestEffort('2023/10/02 14:30:00') WHERE description = 'Event 1';
SELECT description, parseDateTimeBestEffort('10-03-2023 16:45:30') AS event_parsed FROM test_dates;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates WHERE event_time > parseDateTimeBestEffort('2023-10-01 00:00:00');
